General.Name: Chuang’s Consortium International Ltd
General.Description: Chuang's Consortium International Limited, an investment holding company, engages in property development in Hong Kong, the People's Republic of China, and internationally. The company owns a portfolio of investment properties comprising retail, office, residential, hotel, serviced apartments, and commercial/industrial buildings, as well as carparking spaces, resorts, and villas. It is also involved in the property investment and management; securities investment and trading; money lending; hiring of assets and trading of merchandises; and the provision of project management, property agency, and nominee and secretarial services. In addition, the company engages in the development, construction, and operation of cemeteries and the provision of related management services; and the manufacture and sale of home finishing products. Chuang's Consortium International Limited was incorporated in 1970 and is based in Central, Hong Kong. Chuang's Consortium International Limited is a subsidiary of Evergain Holdings Limited.
